review_reason: Phase 4 blocked: BFMCS forward_F/backward_P/modal_backward properties cannot be resolved by W/D separation alone - requires either proving staged construction completeness or alternative proof strategy

artifacts.summary: Separated TaskFrame with D = TimelineQuot, W = ParametricCanonicalWorldState
WorldHistory mapping TimelineQuot -> ParametricCanonicalWorldState with shift-closed Omega
Implementation progress including Phase 1-3 completion and Phase 4 blocker analysis

partial_progress.details: Phases 1-3 completed (0 sorries, 0 axioms). Phase 4 blocked: truth lemma requires BFMCS with forward_F/backward_P/modal_backward, which are not resolved by W/D separation architecture.

errors.message: BFMCS temporal coherence (forward_F, backward_P) and modal saturation (modal_backward) cannot be proven with current infrastructure
errors.recommendation: Three possible paths: (1) Prove staged construction adds all F/P witnesses, (2) Implement on-demand witness family construction, (3) Find alternative completeness proof that avoids BFMCS coherence requirements

completion_data.completion_summary: Built W/D separated TaskFrame and WorldHistory infrastructure (0 sorries); Phase 4 blocked on BFMCS coherence properties
